ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport being played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match is played */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Final, Postponed, Canceled) */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the match */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the match record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sport record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "win_count" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "loss_count" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "draw_count" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the venue's website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the venue record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach was hired */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the coach record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
